summary: The test suite provides multi-layered coverage (unit tests via ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 + end-to-end via Invoke-ActTests.ps1) that exercises most core requirements: artifact loading, three retention policies, policy overlap, dry-run mode, and workflow structure validation. However, critical fixture files (age-policy.json, size-policy.json, combined-policies.json) and the workflow YAML are referenced but not provided, making end-to-end validation untestable. Unit tests lack edge cases (invalid JSON, malformed dates, negative values, empty arrays) and don't verify the machine-parseable CLI output block. The Invoke-ActTests.ps1 harness is well-structured but complex enough to introduce its own bugs. The suite would catch major regressions but likely miss subtle policy interaction bugs and malformed input scenarios.
